On Thursday October 3rd I was driving in stop and go city traffic. After accelerating to leave from a light my jeep died in the middle of the intersection. Total loss of power and slammed to a stop almost causing the person behind me to hit me. It started I drove it back to work.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Jeep Compass owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 47 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (47% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
